title: MCA Jobs 2026 – Non Faculty Posts
shortInfo: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 11 Non Faculty Posts. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, 12TH, MCA, PG Diploma Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through AIIMS Deoghar website, aiimsdeoghar.edu.in.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Deoghar Non Faculty Posts Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Biomedical Engineer, Assistant Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar (AIIMS Deoghar) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 11 Non Faculty Posts. Candidates with Any Graduate, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, 12TH, MCA, PG Diploma Can Apply Offline. The candidate shall apply Offline through AIIMS Deoghar website, aiimsdeoghar.edu.in.

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid only through Demand Draft and once remitted will not be refunded.

age_limit.details: All the advertised posts are for the Unreserved (UR) category and one post is available for each of the positions listed below.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, 12TH, MCA, PG Diploma

how_to_apply: Visit the official website of AIIMS Deoghar and download the prescribed application form from the recruitment section.
Fill the application form carefully in all respects and affix a recent passport size colour photograph in the given space.

Attach self-attested photocopies of date of birth certificate, degree certificates, experience certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), No Objection Certificate (if working in Govt/Autonomous body) etc. in the order mentioned in the advertisement.
Draw a Demand Draft of the applicable application fee in favour of “AIIMS Deoghar” payable at Deoghar and attach the original DD with the application.

Send the complete application form along with all enclosures and Demand Draft by post to the following address: Recruitment Cell, All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Deoghar, At - Devipur Campus, Ramsagar, Deoghar - 814117, Jharkhand.
Ensure that the application reaches the above address within 45 days from the publication of the advertisement in Employment News.
important_instructions: Candidates already working in Central/State Government/Semi-Government/Autonomous bodies must submit a No Objection Certificate from their present employer at the time of interview.
Canvassing of any kind will lead to disqualification.
Applications incomplete in any respect will be summarily rejected.
The Competent Authority reserves the right to amend, cancel or change the advertisement as a whole or in part without assigning any reason.
Any corrigendum or updates regarding this recruitment will be uploaded only on the official website of AIIMS Deoghar; candidates are advised to visit the website regularly.

faq.question: For how long will the AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty posts be filled on contract?
faq.answer: These posts are purely on contract for 11 months or until regular appointments against the same posts are made, whichever is earlier.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for AIIMS Deoghar Non-Faculty contractual posts?
faq.answer: The application has to be submitted in offline mode only through the prescribed application form and sent by post to AIIMS Deoghar.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for SC/ST/PwD/Women candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC, ST, PwD and Women candidates.

faq.question: What is the application fee for General and OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹3000 for General category and ₹1000 for OBC category candidates, payable via Demand Draft in favour of AIIMS Deoghar.

faq.question: Will contractual appointees be eligible for Government benefits like PF or pension?
faq.answer: No, contractual appointees will not be entitled to benefits like Provident Fund, Pension, Gratuity, Seniority or Promotion available to regular Government servants.

seo_tags: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Deoghar Non Faculty Posts Recruitment 2026
AIIMS Deoghar Non Faculty Posts Jobs 2026
